_comment: Copy this file to config.json (gitignored). Humans and agents both edit config.json. Keys starting with _ are documentation only and are ignored by scripts/config.py. Secrets never go here; see secrets.example/README.md and SETUP.md.

_fields.identity.name: Display name injected into AI prompts (ask, brief, ingest). Required. Interview the operator; never invent.
_fields.identity.context: One line: role and focus for pre-engagement briefs (e.g. early-stage VC focused on AI infra).
_fields.identity.interests: Array of short topic tags. Seeds Profile and personalizes youtube-likes judgment context.
_fields.identity.git_emails: Emails that identify the operator's own commits for the github source.
_fields.identity.goodreads_user_id: Numeric id from the Goodreads profile URL. Required only if sources.goodreads is true.
_fields.identity.substack_feed: Full publication RSS URL. Required only if sources.substack is true; otherwise set sources.substack false.
_fields.browser: Browser for xtap AND yt-dlp cookies (podcasts, youtube_likes): brave, chrome, chromium, firefox, edge, safari.
_fields.secrets_dir: Absolute or ~ path outside the vault for secret files. Default ~/Developer/helpers.
_fields.models.process: Nightly filing model chain, best first. List of 'claude:<model-id>', 'grok[:<model-id>]', or a bare model id (implies claude). The pass slides down the list to the first CLI that is installed and succeeds. A single string still works.
_fields.schedule.ingest_hour: Local hour (0-23) the daily launchd ingest fires. Default 5. bootstrap.sh writes it into the plist.
_fields.schedule.ingest_minute: Minute (0-59) for the daily ingest. Default 0.
_fields.podcasts.cutoff: YYYYMMDD floor for podcast backfill (episodes older than this are skipped). E.g. 20220224 (Ukraine invasion week) for a world-events floor, or 20221128 (ChatGPT week) for a shorter AI-era backfill.
_fields.sources.x_bookmarks: true/false. X bookmarks via vendored xtap. Needs browser login + xtap auth.
_fields.sources.goodreads: true/false. Goodreads RSS. Needs goodreads_user_id + secrets_dir/goodreads/rss-key.
_fields.sources.substack: true/false. Substack publication archive. Needs identity.substack_feed.
_fields.sources.github: true/false. Recent own commits via gh. Needs gh auth + github_login/git_emails.
_fields.sources.podcasts: true/false. YouTube podcast synthesis. Needs shows.json + claude + yt-dlp.
_fields.sources.youtube_likes: true/false. Long-form liked videos. Needs YouTube session + claude + yt-dlp.
_fields.sources.google_drive_meetings: true/false. Google Meet's auto-generated 'Notes by Gemini' docs, filed into Meetings/<project>.md. Needs a one-time OAuth setup: scripts/google_drive_auth.py. Off by default.

identity.name: Your Name
identity.context: what you do in one line, used to personalize pre-engagement briefs (e.g. early-stage VC focused on AI infra)
